(** * Translation functors *)
(**
- Translation functors for C(A)
 - T ∘ T^{-1} = Id
 - Translation functors form equivalence
- Translation functors for K(A)
 - T ∘ T^{-1} = Id
 - Translation functors form equivalence
*)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.UnivalenceAxiom.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TransportMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Local Open Scope cat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Abelian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AbelianToAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AdditiveFunctors.

Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.Complexes.
Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.KA.

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

Local Open Scope hz_scope.
Opaque hz isdecrelhzeq hzplus hzminus hzone hzzero iscommringops ZeroArrow.

(** * Translation funtor for C(A) and for K(A) *)
(** ** Introduction
We define the translation functor T : C(A) -> C(A) for complexes, and a translation functor
T' : K(A) -> K(A). The functor T' is constructed so that we have the following commutative
diagram
                            C(A) ---T---> C(A)
                             |             |
                            K(A) ---T'--> K(A)
Here the vertical functors are given by [ComplexHomotFunctor]. The functor T sends a complex
      # ... -> X^{i-1} --(d^{i-1})--> X^i --(d^i)--> X^{i+1} -> ... #
      $ ... -> X^{i-1} --(d^{i-1})--> X^i --(d^i)--> X^{i+1} -> ... $
to the complex
      # ... -> X^i --(-d^i)--> X^{i+1} --(-d^{i+1})--> X^{i+2} -> ... #
      $ ... -> X^i --(-d^i)--> X^{i+1} --(-d^{i+1})--> X^{i+2} -> ... $
More precicely, on objects # X^i ↦ X^{i+1} # $ X^i ↦ X^{i+1} $ and differentials
# d^i_X ↦ -d^{i+1}_X # $ d^i_X ↦ -d^{i+1}_X $. A morphism f : X -> Y is mapped by
# f^i ↦ f^{i+1} # $ f^i ↦ f^{i+1} $. We also construct the inverse translation T^{-1} which is the
unique functor such that T ∘ T^{-1} = id and T^{-1} ∘ T = id. All the functors T, T^{-1}, and T'
are additive.

The functor T : C(A) -> C(A) is constructed in [TranslationFunctor]. It is shown to be additive in
[TranslationFunctor_Additive]. In [TranslationFunctorPreservesHomotopies] we show that T preserves
homotopies, that is if f is homotopic to g, then T(f) is homotopic to T(g). In
[InvTranslationFunctor] we construct T^{-1}.
*)
Section translation_functor.

  Variable A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.


  (** ** Translation functor for C(A) *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C (i + 1)) · to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C (i + 1)) · to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C (i + 1) · to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
to_inv (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1) · Diff C (i + 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
Diff C (i + 1) · Diff C (i + 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i + 1))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
 apply (DSq A C (i + 1)).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
Complex A

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
Complex A

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
hz → A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ ?D i, ?D (i + 1) ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
hz → A
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
A
 exact (C (i + 1)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, C (i0 + 1)) i,
(λ i0 : hz, C (i0 + 1)) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
A ⟦ (λ i : hz, C (i + 1)) i,
(λ i : hz, C (i + 1)) (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, to_inv (Diff C (i0 + 1))) i
· (λ i0 : hz, to_inv (Diff C (i0 + 1))) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i0 : hz, C (i0 + 1)) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, C (i0 + 1)) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
(λ i : hz, to_inv (Diff C (i + 1))) i
· (λ i : hz, to_inv (Diff C (i + 1))) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i : hz, C (i + 1)) i)
  ((λ i : hz, C (i + 1)) (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (TranslationFunctor_comp C i).
  Defined.
  Global Transparent TranslationComplex.

  Definition DiffTranslationComplex (C : Complex A) (i : hz) :
    A⟦ TranslationComplex C i, TranslationComplex C (i + 1) ⟧ := to_inv (Diff C (i + 1)).
  Global Transparent DiffTranslationComplex.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
DiffTranslationComplex C i
· DiffTranslationComplex C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (TranslationComplex C i)
  (TranslationComplex C (i + 1 + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
DiffTranslationComplex C i
· DiffTranslationComplex C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (TranslationComplex C i)
  (TranslationComplex C (i + 1 + 1))

    exact (TranslationFunctor_comp C i).
  Qed.

  Definition TranslationMorphism_mor {C1 C2 : Complex A} (f : Morphism C1 C2) (i : hz) :
    A⟦TranslationComplex C1 i, TranslationComplex C2 i⟧ := f (i + 1).

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
TranslationMorphism_mor f i
· DiffTranslationComplex C2 i =
DiffTranslationComplex C1 i
· TranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
TranslationMorphism_mor f i
· DiffTranslationComplex C2 i =
DiffTranslationComplex C1 i
· TranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
TranslationMorphism_mor f i · to_inv (Diff C2 (i + 1)) =
to_inv (Diff C1 (i + 1))
· TranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
TranslationMorphism_mor f i · to_inv (Diff C2 (i + 1)) =
to_inv
  (Diff C1 (i + 1) · TranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (TranslationMorphism_mor f i · Diff C2 (i + 1)) =
to_inv
  (Diff C1 (i + 1) · TranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
TranslationMorphism_mor f i · Diff C2 (i + 1) =
Diff C1 (i + 1) · TranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)
 apply (MComm f (i + 1)).
  Qed.

  Definition TranslationMorphism (C1 C2 : Complex A) (f : Morphism C1 C2) :
    Morphism (TranslationComplex C1) (TranslationComplex C2) :=
    make_Morphism
      A (TranslationComplex C1) (TranslationComplex C2)
      (λ i : hz, TranslationMorphism_mor f i) (λ i : hz, TranslationFunctor_comm f i).

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A → ComplexPreCat_Additive A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a b : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A → ComplexPreCat_Additive A
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
ComplexPreCat_Additive A
 exact (TranslationComplex C).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a b : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ComplexPreCat_Additive A
  ⟦ (λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     TranslationComplex C) a,
  (λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
   TranslationComplex C) b ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexPreCat_Additive A
⟦ (λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
   TranslationComplex C) C1,
(λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A, TranslationComplex C)
  C2 ⟧
 exact (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor TranslationFunctor_data

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor TranslationFunctor_data

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_idax TranslationFunctor_data
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_compax TranslationFunctor_data

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_idax TranslationFunctor_data
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
# TranslationFunctor_data (identity C) =
identity (TranslationFunctor_data C)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
TranslationMorphism C C (IdMor C) =
IdMor (TranslationComplex C)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
TranslationMorphism C C (IdMor C) i =
IdMor (TranslationComplex C) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
TranslationMorphism C C (IdMor C) i =
IdMor (TranslationComplex C) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
identity (C (i + 1)) = identity (C (i + 1))
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_compax TranslationFunctor_data
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
# TranslationFunctor_data (f · g) =
# TranslationFunctor_data f
· # TranslationFunctor_data g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
TranslationMorphism C1 C3 (MorphismComp f g) =
MorphismComp (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C2 C3 g)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
TranslationMorphism C1 C3 (MorphismComp f g) i =
MorphismComp (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C2 C3 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
i: hz
TranslationMorphism C1 C3 (MorphismComp f g) i =
MorphismComp (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C2 C3 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
i: hz
f (i + 1) · g (i + 1) =
TranslationMorphism_mor f i
· TranslationMorphism_mor g i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive A

ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive A

functor_data (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor ?F

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
 exact TranslationFunctor_data.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor TranslationFunctor_data
 exact TranslationFunctor_isfunctor.
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor TranslationFunctor

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor TranslationFunctor

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a1 a2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
ismonoidfun # TranslationFunctor

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
ismonoidfun # TranslationFunctor

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
isbinopfun # TranslationFunctor
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
# TranslationFunctor 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
isbinopfun # TranslationFunctor
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
# TranslationFunctor (f + g)%addmonoid =
(# TranslationFunctor f + # TranslationFunctor g)%addmonoid
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f g) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
∏ i : hz,
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f g) i =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
i: hz
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f g) i =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)) (f (i + 1))
  (g (i + 1)) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
  (TranslationMorphism_mor f i)
  (TranslationMorphism_mor g i)
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
# TranslationFunctor 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ZeroMorphism A C1 C2) =
ZeroMorphism A (TranslationComplex C1)
  (TranslationComplex C2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ZeroMorphism A C1 C2) i =
ZeroMorphism A (TranslationComplex C1)
  (TranslationComplex C2) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ZeroMorphism A C1 C2) i =
ZeroMorphism A (TranslationComplex C1)
  (TranslationComplex C2) i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AdditiveFunctor (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AdditiveFunctor (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor ?F

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive A
 exact TranslationFunctor.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor TranslationFunctor
 exact TranslationFunctor_isAdditive.
  Defined.

  (** *** Translation functor preserves homotopies *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomot A (TranslationComplex C1)
  (TranslationComplex C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomot A (TranslationComplex C1)
  (TranslationComplex C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ TranslationComplex C1 i,
TranslationComplex C2 (i - 1) ⟧

    exact (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
                      (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1 @ ! hzrminusplus i 1))
                      (to_inv (H (i + 1)))).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A (TranslationHomot H) =
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A (TranslationHomot H) =
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A
  (λ i : hz,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (hzrplusminus i 1 @ ! hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (H (i + 1)))) =
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A
  (λ i : pr1 hz,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (hzrplusminus i 1 @ ! hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (H (i + 1)))) =
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
ComplexHomotMorphism A
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i0 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (hzrplusminus i0 1 @ ! hzrminusplus i0 1))
     (to_inv (H (i0 + 1)))) i =
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ComplexHomotMorphism A H) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
ComplexHomotMorphism A
  (λ i : pr1 hz,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (hzrplusminus i 1 @ ! hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (H (i + 1)))) i =
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ComplexHomotMorphism A H) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i + 1))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
        (maponpaths C2
           (hzrplusminus i 1 @ ! hzrminusplus i 1))
        (to_inv (H (i + 1)))
      · to_inv (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i + 1))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i + 1))
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1 @
              ! hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          (to_inv (H (i + 1 + 1))))) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1) · H (i + 1 + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i + 1))
        (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
        (maponpaths C2
           (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1 @
            ! idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
        (to_inv (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
      · to_inv (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i + 1))
        (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
              ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
          (to_inv (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))

     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
              ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
          (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
e: maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C2 (i0 + 1))
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths C2
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
           (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
              ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
          (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))

     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))

  (transportf

     (maponpaths C2
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
           (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)))

             (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))

  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))

    (* The first elements of to_binop are the same *)

C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
e1: transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
        (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
   · transportf
       (precategory_morphisms
          (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
       (maponpaths C2
          (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
           ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
       (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
   · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
           (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
              ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
          (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
 ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1) @
maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1): i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 - 1 = i - 1 + 1 + 1
Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 tmp) (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))

       (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
   · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
           (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
              ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
          (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
e1: transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
        (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
   · transportf
       (precategory_morphisms
          (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))
       (maponpaths C2
          (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1 @
           ! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
       (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))) =

  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)
   · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))

  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1)))

  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · H (i - 1 + 1 + 1 + 1))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

    (* Show that the first elements of to_binop are the same *)
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= transport_hz_source_target A C2 1 (Diff C2)
  (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1) (i - 1 + 1)
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1): Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
(maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1))
(Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

  (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1) (i - 1 + 1)
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1): Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1) =

(maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
(transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1))
(Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2
          (maponpaths_2 hzplus
             (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1))
       (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (H (i - 1 + 1 + 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

    (! maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))

                (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1))

H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (idpath (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (maponpaths_2 hzplus
           (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1))
     (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))) =

  (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : hz, A ⟦ C2 x, C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (idpath (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2
        (maponpaths_2 hzplus
           (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1))
     (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))

  (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)
        1)) (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (Diff C2 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
maponpaths C2
  (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1) =
maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) 1 =
hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
     (TranslationComplex C2))
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
     (TranslationComplex C2))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
isaprop
  (subgrhrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2))
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
(∑
 b : Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid
       (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
       (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2),
 pr1 b = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid)
→ subgrhrel
    (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
       (TranslationComplex C2))
    (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
    (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
isaprop
  (subgrhrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2))
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
 apply propproperty.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
     (TranslationComplex C2))
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
     (TranslationComplex C2))
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid
isaprop
  (subgrhrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2))
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid
(∑ H : ComplexHomot A C1 C2,
 ComplexHomotMorphism A H = H11)
→ subgrhrel
    (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
       (TranslationComplex C2))
    (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
    (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid
isaprop
  (subgrhrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2))
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
 apply propproperty.

H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid
(∑ H : ComplexHomot A C1 C2,
 ComplexHomotMorphism A H = H11)
→ subgrhrel
    (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
       (TranslationComplex C2))
    (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
    (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11 =
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
(λ b : Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid
         (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
            (TranslationComplex C1 -->
             TranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat)
         (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
            (TranslationComplex C2)),
 pr1 b =
 (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f +
  ( - TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid)
  ((TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11
    :
    Groups2.grtomonoid
      (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
         (TranslationComplex C1 -->
          TranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat)),,
   ((λ (P : hProp)
     (X : (∑
           H : ComplexHomot A (TranslationComplex C1)
                 (TranslationComplex C2),
           ComplexHomotMorphism A H =
           TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11) → P),
     X
       (TranslationHomot HH1,,
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (Morphism (TranslationComplex C1)
              (TranslationComplex C2))
           (ComplexHomotMorphism A
              (TranslationHomot HH1))
           (TranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1))
           (λ m : Morphism (TranslationComplex C1)
                    (TranslationComplex C2),
            m = TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (Morphism C1 C2)
              (ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1) H11
              (λ m : Morphism C1 C2,
               TranslationMorphism C1 C2 m =
               TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11)
              (idpath (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11))
              HH2) (TranslationFunctorHomotopies HH1)
         :
         (λ H : ComplexHomot A (TranslationComplex C1)
                  (TranslationComplex C2),
          ComplexHomotMorphism A H =
          TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11)
           (TranslationHomot HH1))))
    :
    (λ x : Groups2.grtomonoid
             (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
                (TranslationComplex C1 -->
                 TranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat),
     Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid
       (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
          (TranslationComplex C1 -->
           TranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat)
       (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationComplex C1)
          (TranslationComplex C2)) x)
      (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11
       :
       Groups2.grtomonoid
         (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
            (TranslationComplex C1 -->
             TranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11 =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
TranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear TranslationFunctor_Additive
  f (to_inv g): # TranslationFunctor_Additive (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_binop (TranslationFunctor_Additive C1) (TranslationFunctor_Additive C2)
(# TranslationFunctor_Additive f)
(# TranslationFunctor_Additive (to_inv g))
TranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear TranslationFunctor_Additive
  f (MorphismOp_inv A g): TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
(TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g))
TranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear TranslationFunctor_Additive
  f (MorphismOp_inv A g): TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
(TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g))
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g) =
MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorInv TranslationFunctor_Additive g: # TranslationFunctor_Additive (to_inv g) =
to_inv (# TranslationFunctor_Additive g)
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g) =
MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorInv TranslationFunctor_Additive g: TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g) =
MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)
TranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g) =
MorphismOp_inv A (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

      exact tmp.
  Qed.

  (** *** Inverse of the translation functor functor *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths C
       (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
        ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths C
       (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
        ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (C (i + 1 + 1 - 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths C (idpath (i + 1 - 1 + 1)))
    (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (C (i + 1 - 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
  (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
    (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)) · to_inv (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
to_inv (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
Diff C (i - 1) · Diff C (i - 1 + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C (i - 1))
  (C (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
 apply DSq.
  Qed.

?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =

i: hz
A
 exact (C (i - 1)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
A ⟦ (λ i0 : hz, C (i0 - 1)) i,
(λ i0 : hz, C (i0 - 1)) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
A ⟦ (λ i : hz, C (i - 1)) i,
(λ i : hz, C (i - 1)) (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (transportf
                         (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
                         (maponpaths C ((hzrminusplus i 1) @ (! hzrplusminus i 1)))
                         (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
   (maponpaths C
      (hzrminusplus i0 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i0 1))
   (to_inv (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i0 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C
        (hzrminusplus i0 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i0 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C (i0 - 1)))) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i0 : hz, C (i0 - 1)) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz, C (i0 - 1)) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
   (maponpaths C
      (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
   (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)))) i
· (λ i : hz,
   transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1)))) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i : hz, C (i - 1)) i)
  ((λ i : hz, C (i - 1)) (i + 1 + 1))
 exact (InvTranslationFunctor_comp C i).
  Defined.
  Global Transparent InvTranslationComplex.

  Definition DiffInvTranslationComplex (C : Complex A) (i : hz) :
    A⟦ InvTranslationComplex C i, InvTranslationComplex C (i + 1) ⟧ :=
    transportf
      (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1)))
      (maponpaths C ((hzrminusplus i 1) @ (! hzrplusminus i 1)))
      (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1))).

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
DiffInvTranslationComplex C i
· DiffInvTranslationComplex C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (InvTranslationComplex C i)
  (InvTranslationComplex C (i + 1 + 1))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
DiffInvTranslationComplex C i
· DiffInvTranslationComplex C (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (InvTranslationComplex C i)
  (InvTranslationComplex C (i + 1 + 1))

    exact (InvTranslationFunctor_comp C i).
  Qed.

  Definition InvTranslationMorphism_mor {C1 C2 : Complex A} (f : Morphism C1 C2) (i : hz) :
    A⟦InvTranslationComplex C1 i, InvTranslationComplex C2 i⟧ := f (i - 1).

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f i
· DiffInvTranslationComplex C2 i =
DiffInvTranslationComplex C1 i
· InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f i
· DiffInvTranslationComplex C2 i =
DiffInvTranslationComplex C1 i
· InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2
       (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
    (to_inv (Diff C2 (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)

C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (InvTranslationComplex C1 i))
  (maponpaths C2
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (InvTranslationMorphism_mor f i
   · to_inv (Diff C2 (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)

  (precategory_morphisms (InvTranslationComplex C1 i))

  (f (i - 1) · to_inv (Diff C2 (i - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))) · f (i + 1 - 1)

   · transportf

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))
   · transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1)))
       (maponpaths C2
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
       (f (i - 1 + 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))) · f (i + 1 - 1))

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz

· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1)))
       (maponpaths C2
          (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
       (f (i - 1 + 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))) · f (i + 1 - 1))

     maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1)) =

  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))

        hzrplusminus i 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1)) =

i: hz
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1 @ idpath i))
    (f (i - 1 + 1)) =

  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))) · f (i + 1 - 1))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
    (f (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1
        (idpath (i - 1 + 1) @
         ! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
   · f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
   · f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= transport_hz_double_section A C1 C2 f
  (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1) (i - 1 + 1)
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1): transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
(maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1))
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= transport_hz_double_section A C1 C2 f
  (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1) (i - 1 + 1)
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1): transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
(maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1))
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= transport_hz_double_section A C1 C2 f
  (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1) (i - 1 + 1)
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1): transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
(maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1))
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
tmp:= transport_hz_double_section A C1 C2 f
  (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1) (i - 1 + 1)
  (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1): transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
(maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
(maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) (f (i - 1 + 1))
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)) · f (i - 1 + 1) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
· transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
    (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
    (f (i - 1 + 1))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (f (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
  (f (i - 1 + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition InvTranslationMorphism (C1 C2 : Complex A) (f : Morphism C1 C2) :
    Morphism (InvTranslationComplex C1) (InvTranslationComplex C2) :=
    make_Morphism
      A (InvTranslationComplex C1) (InvTranslationComplex C2)
      (λ i : hz, InvTranslationMorphism_mor f i) (λ i : hz, InvTranslationFunctor_comm f i).

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A → ComplexPreCat_Additive A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a b : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A → ComplexPreCat_Additive A
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
ComplexPreCat_Additive A
 exact (InvTranslationComplex C).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a b : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ComplexPreCat_Additive A
  ⟦ (λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     InvTranslationComplex C) a,
  (λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
   InvTranslationComplex C) b ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexPreCat_Additive A
⟦ (λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
   InvTranslationComplex C) C1,
(λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
 InvTranslationComplex C) C2 ⟧
 exact (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor InvTranslationFunctor_data

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor InvTranslationFunctor_data

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_idax InvTranslationFunctor_data
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_compax InvTranslationFunctor_data

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_idax InvTranslationFunctor_data
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
# InvTranslationFunctor_data (identity C) =
identity (InvTranslationFunctor_data C)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
InvTranslationMorphism C C (IdMor C) =
IdMor (InvTranslationComplex C)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
InvTranslationMorphism C C (IdMor C) i =
IdMor (InvTranslationComplex C) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism C C (IdMor C) i =
IdMor (InvTranslationComplex C) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
identity (C (i - 1)) = identity (C (i - 1))
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_compax InvTranslationFunctor_data
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
# InvTranslationFunctor_data (f · g) =
# InvTranslationFunctor_data f
· # InvTranslationFunctor_data g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C3 (MorphismComp f g) =
MorphismComp (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C2 C3 g)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C3 (MorphismComp f g) i =
MorphismComp (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C2 C3 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C3 (MorphismComp f g) i =
MorphismComp (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C2 C3 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
i: hz
f (i - 1) · g (i - 1) =
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f i
· InvTranslationMorphism_mor g i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive A

ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive A

  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

is_functor ?F

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
 exact InvTranslationFunctor_data.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor InvTranslationFunctor_data
 exact InvTranslationFunctor_isfunctor.
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor InvTranslationFunctor

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor InvTranslationFunctor

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a1 a2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
ismonoidfun # InvTranslationFunctor

C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
ismonoidfun # InvTranslationFunctor

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
isbinopfun # InvTranslationFunctor
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
# InvTranslationFunctor 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
isbinopfun # InvTranslationFunctor
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
# InvTranslationFunctor (f + g)%addmonoid =
(# InvTranslationFunctor f + # InvTranslationFunctor g)%addmonoid
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f g) =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
∏ i : hz,
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f g) i =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f g) i =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f, g: Groups2.grtomonoid
  (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i - 1)) (C2 (i - 1)) (f (i - 1))
  (g (i - 1)) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
  (InvTranslationMorphism_mor f i)
  (InvTranslationMorphism_mor g i)
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
# InvTranslationFunctor 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ZeroMorphism A C1 C2) =
ZeroMorphism A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
  (InvTranslationComplex C2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ZeroMorphism A C1 C2) i =
ZeroMorphism A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
  (InvTranslationComplex C2) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (ZeroMorphism A C1 C2) i =
ZeroMorphism A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
  (InvTranslationComplex C2) i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

isAdditiveFunctor ?F

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟶ ComplexPreCat_Additive A
 exact InvTranslationFunctor.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor InvTranslationFunctor
 exact InvTranslationFunctor_isAdditive.
  Defined.


  (** *** InvTranslation functor preserves homotopies *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomot A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
  (InvTranslationComplex C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomot A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
  (InvTranslationComplex C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
A ⟦ InvTranslationComplex C1 i,
InvTranslationComplex C2 (i - 1) ⟧
 exact (to_inv (H (i - 1))).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A (InvTranslationHomot H) =
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A (InvTranslationHomot H) =
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A (λ i : hz, to_inv (H (i - 1))) =
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
ComplexHomotMorphism A
  (λ i : pr1 hz, to_inv (H (i - 1))) =
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (ComplexHomotMorphism A H)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
ComplexHomotMorphism A
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, to_inv (H (i0 - 1))) i =
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (ComplexHomotMorphism A H) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
ComplexHomotMorphism A
  (λ i : pr1 hz, to_inv (H (i - 1))) i =
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (ComplexHomotMorphism A H) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i - 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (H (i - 1))
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i - 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrminusplus (i - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i - 1) 1))
          (to_inv (Diff C2 (i - 1 - 1)))))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1
           (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
        (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1)))
      · to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1)))) =
to_binop (C1 (i - 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i - 1) 1))
     (H (i - 1) · Diff C2 (i - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1) · H (i - 1 + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
          (to_inv (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
        (maponpaths C1
           (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1 @
            ! idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
        (to_inv (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
      · to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1)))) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
          (to_inv (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1 @
         idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
   · to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1))) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
          (to_inv (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
   · to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1))) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
      · to_inv
          (transportf
             (precategory_morphisms
                (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
             (maponpaths C2
                (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
                 ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
             (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (to_inv (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
   · to_inv (H (i + 1 - 1))) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))

  (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
   · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1))

  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))

             (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
          (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) · H (i + 1 - 1)) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
    (H (i + 1 - 1)) =
Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
    (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1))

  (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1))

H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (! hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
  (H (i + 1 - 1)) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
  (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1))

     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
          (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) · H (i + 1 - 1)) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
e1: transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
  (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) · H (i + 1 - 1) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
  (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
   · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1))
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
          (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1))) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))

C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C2 (i - 1))
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
      · transportf
          (precategory_morphisms
             (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
          (maponpaths C2
             (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
              ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
          (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1))))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1))) =
to_binop (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
     (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))

     (Diff C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · H (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))

i: hz

  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))

     (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
  (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1)
   · transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)))
       (maponpaths C2
          (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
           ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
       (Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1))) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1))
  (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1))

     (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1))
