A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C2 (i0 - 1))
  (idpath (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)) =
maponpaths C2
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 - 1)
     (idpath (i + 1 - 1 - 1 + 1)))
 apply idpath.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths C2
     ((hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
       ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1) @
      maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 - 1)
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1)))
  (H (i + 1 - 1 - 1) · Diff C2 (i + 1 - 1 - 1 - 1)) =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1 - 1 - 1)))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
maponpaths C2
  ((hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
    ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1) @
   maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 - 1)
     (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1)) =
maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
i: hz
(hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1 @
 ! hzrplusminus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1) @
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 - 1)
  (hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1) 1) =
hzrminusplus (i + 1 - 1 - 1) 1
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
     (InvTranslationComplex C2))
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

     (InvTranslationComplex C2))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
isaprop
  (subgrhrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
(∑
 b : Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid
       (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
       (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2),
 pr1 b = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid)
→ subgrhrel
    (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
       (InvTranslationComplex C2))
    (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
    (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) f g
isaprop
  (subgrhrel
     (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))
 apply propproperty.

H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: pr1 (H11,, H12) = (f + ( - g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
     (InvTranslationComplex C2))
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)

f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11

(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
H: ∑ H : ComplexHomot A C1 C2,
ComplexHomotMorphism A H = H11
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
     (InvTranslationComplex C2))
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2

subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationComplex C1)
     (InvTranslationComplex C2))
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)

HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
(λ b : Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid
         (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
            (InvTranslationComplex C1 -->
             InvTranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat)
         (ComplexHomotSubgrp A
            (InvTranslationComplex C1)
            (InvTranslationComplex C2)),
 pr1 b =
 (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f +
  ( - InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)%abgrcat)%addmonoid)
  ((InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11
    :
    Groups2.grtomonoid
      (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
         (InvTranslationComplex C1 -->
          InvTranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat)),,
   ((λ (P : hProp)
     (X : (∑
           H : ComplexHomot A
                 (InvTranslationComplex C1)
                 (InvTranslationComplex C2),
           ComplexHomotMorphism A H =
           InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11) → P),
     X
       (InvTranslationHomot HH1,,
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (Morphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
              (InvTranslationComplex C2))
           (ComplexHomotMorphism A
              (InvTranslationHomot HH1))
           (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1))
           (λ m : Morphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
                    (InvTranslationComplex C2),
            m = InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (Morphism C1 C2)
              (ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1) H11
              (λ m : Morphism C1 C2,
               InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 m =
               InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11)
              (idpath
                 (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11))
              HH2)
           (InvTranslationFunctorHomotopies HH1)
         :
         (λ H : ComplexHomot A
                  (InvTranslationComplex C1)
                  (InvTranslationComplex C2),
          ComplexHomotMorphism A H =
          InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11)
           (InvTranslationHomot HH1))))
    :
    (λ x : Groups2.grtomonoid
             (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
                (InvTranslationComplex C1 -->
                 InvTranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat),
     Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid
       (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
          (InvTranslationComplex C1 -->
           InvTranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat)
       (ComplexHomotSubgrp A
          (InvTranslationComplex C1)
          (InvTranslationComplex C2)) x)
      (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11
       :
       Groups2.grtomonoid
         (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr
            (InvTranslationComplex C1 -->
             InvTranslationComplex C2)%abgrcat))))

H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 H11 =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))

  (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =

(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear
  InvTranslationFunctor_Additive f (to_inv g): # InvTranslationFunctor_Additive (to_binop C1 C2 f (to_inv g)) =
to_binop (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive C1)
(InvTranslationFunctor_Additive C2) (# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive f)
(# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive (to_inv g))
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))

f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear
  InvTranslationFunctor_Additive f
  (MorphismOp_inv A g): InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
(InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g))
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
  (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
  (MorphismOp_inv A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g))

H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2

tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear
  InvTranslationFunctor_Additive f
  (MorphismOp_inv A g): InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =
MorphismOp A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)
(InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g))

  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g)) =

HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorInv InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
  g: # InvTranslationFunctor_Additive (to_inv g) =
to_inv (# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive g)
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g) =
MorphismOp_inv A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f, g: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H11: Morphism C1 C2
H12: Groups2.subgrtosubmonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (C1 --> C2)%abgrcat)
(ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2) H11
H2: H11 = MorphismOp A f (MorphismOp_inv A g)
HH1: ComplexHomot A C1 C2
HH2: ComplexHomotMorphism A HH1 = H11
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorInv InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
  g: InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g) =
MorphismOp_inv A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)
InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 (MorphismOp_inv A g) =
MorphismOp_inv A (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 g)

      exact tmp.
  Qed.

  (** ** Translation functor is an isomorphism, with inverse the inverse translation. *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AA: UU
B, BB: AA → UU
s, s': ∑ x : AA, B x
p: pr1 s = pr1 s'
q: transportf B p (pr2 s) = pr2 s'
x: BB (pr1 s)
transportf (λ x' : ∑ x : AA, B x, BB (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f p q) x =
transportf (λ x : AA, BB x) p x

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AA: UU
B, BB: AA → UU
s, s': ∑ x : AA, B x
p: pr1 s = pr1 s'
q: transportf B p (pr2 s) = pr2 s'
x: BB (pr1 s)
transportf (λ x' : ∑ x : AA, B x, BB (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f p q) x =
transportf (λ x : AA, BB x) p x

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AA: UU
B, BB: AA → UU
s1: AA
s2: B s1
s': ∑ x : AA, B x
p: pr1 (s1,, s2) = pr1 s'
q: transportf B p (pr2 (s1,, s2)) = pr2 s'
x: BB (pr1 (s1,, s2))
transportf (λ x' : ∑ x : AA, B x, BB (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f p q) x =
transportf (λ x : AA, BB x) p x
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AA: UU
B, BB: AA → UU
s1: AA
s2: B s1
s1': AA
s2': B s1'
p: pr1 (s1,, s2) = pr1 (s1',, s2')
q: transportf B p (pr2 (s1,, s2)) = pr2 (s1',, s2')
x: BB (pr1 (s1,, s2))
transportf (λ x' : ∑ x : AA, B x, BB (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f p q) x =
transportf (λ x : AA, BB x) p x
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AA: UU
B, BB: AA → UU
s1: AA
s2: B s1
s1': AA
s2': B s1'
p: s1 = s1'
q: transportf B p s2 = s2'
x: BB s1
transportf (λ x' : ∑ x : AA, B x, BB (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f p q) x =
transportf (λ x : AA, BB x) p x

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AA: UU
B, BB: AA → UU
s1: AA
s2, s2': B s1
q: transportf B (idpath s1) s2 = s2'
x: BB s1
transportf (λ x' : ∑ x : AA, B x, BB (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f (idpath s1) q) x =
transportf (λ x : AA, BB x) (idpath s1) x
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AA: UU
B, BB: AA → UU
s1: AA
s2: B s1
x: BB s1
transportf (λ x' : ∑ x : AA, B x, BB (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f (idpath s1)
     (idpath (transportf B (idpath s1) s2))) x =
transportf (λ x : AA, BB x) (idpath s1) x
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) f i =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧) (H i) (f i)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) f i =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧) (H i) (f i)

C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i

transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) f i =
transportf (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ C1 i, x i ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) (f i)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A

  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)

i: hz
e: transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) f i =
transportf (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ C1 i, x i ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) (f i)

  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) f i =

  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) (f i)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2 i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (idpath C2) f i =
transportf (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ C1 i, x i ⟧)
  (idpath C2) (f i)
 apply idpath.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i

i: hz

  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) (f i) =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ C1 i, x i ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A C2 C2' H H1) (f i) =
transportf (λ x0 : hz → A, A ⟦ C1 i, x0 i ⟧)
  (funextfun C2 C2' H) (f i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ C1 i, x i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f
        (funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
           (λ i : hz, H i)) (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf (λ x0 : hz → A, A ⟦ C1 i, x0 i ⟧)
  (funextfun C2 C2' H) (f i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i

transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f
        (funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
           (λ i : hz, H i)) (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf (λ x0 : hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧)
  (funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2') H) (f i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz, H x0): pr11 C2 = pr11 C2'
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f
        (funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
           (λ i : hz, H i)) (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf (λ x0 : hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧) e
  (f i)

i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz, H x0): pr11 C2 = pr11 C2'
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f
        (funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
           (λ i : pr1 hz, H i))
        (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧) e (f i)

i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')

transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f

        (funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
           (λ i : pr1 hz, H i))
        (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz, H x0): pr11 C2 = pr11 C2'
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧) e (f i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz, H x0): pr11 C2 = pr11 C2'
tmp:= transportf_total2_base C2 C2'
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
  (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1) (f i): transportf
(λ x' : ∑ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
(λ D' : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
∏ i : hz,
pr2 D' i · pr2 D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (pr1 D' i) (pr1 D' (i + 1 + 1))) x,
(λ x0 : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, pr1 x0 i ⟧) (pr1 x'))
(total2_paths_f (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
(ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
(λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
(λ x0 : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, pr1 x0 i ⟧) x)
(total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i)
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧) e (f i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz, H x0): pr11 C2 = pr11 C2'
tmp:= transportf_total2_base C2 C2'
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
  (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1) (f i): transportf
(λ x' : ∑ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
∏ i : hz,
pr2 x i · pr2 x (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (pr1 x i) (pr1 x (i + 1 + 1)),
A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x') i ⟧)
(total2_paths_f (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
(ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
(λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, pr1 x i ⟧) (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
(f i)
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧) e (f i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz, H x0): pr11 C2 = pr11 C2'
tmp:= transportf_total2_base C2 C2'
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
  (ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1) (f i): transportf
(λ x' : ∑ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
∏ i : hz,
pr2 x i · pr2 x (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (pr1 x i) (pr1 x (i + 1 + 1)),
A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, (pr11 x') i ⟧)
(total2_paths_f (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
(ComplexEq'' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
(λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, pr1 x i ⟧) (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1))
(f i)
transportf
  (λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
   A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, pr1 x i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧) e (f i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C2 i = C2' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C2' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C2 i)) = Diff C2' i
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C2) (pr11 C2')
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz, H x0): pr11 C2 = pr11 C2'
transportf
  (λ x : ∑ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧,
   A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, pr1 x i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C2 C2' H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ (pr11 C1) i, x0 i ⟧) e (f i)

    use transportf_total2_base.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1 i
f: Morphism C1' C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism x C2)
  (ComplexEq A C1' C1 H H1) f i =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 i ⟧) (H i) (f i)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1' i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1' i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1' i
f: Morphism C1' C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism x C2)
  (idpath C1') f i =
transportf (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ x i, C2 i ⟧)
  (idpath C1') (f i)
 apply idpath.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,

  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1 i
f: Morphism C1' C2

  (ComplexEq A C1' C1 H H1) (f i) =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1 i

  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1 i
f: Morphism C1' C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ x i, C2 i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f
        (funextfun (pr11 C1') (pr11 C1)
           (λ i : hz, H i)) (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =
transportf (λ x0 : hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, C2 i ⟧)
  (funextfun C1' C1 H) (f i)

  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 x) i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f
        (funextfun (pr11 C1') (pr11 C1)
           (λ i : hz, H i)) (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =

  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 x) i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)

     (ComplexEq'' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =

  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, H i0): pr11 C1' = pr11 C1

  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 x) i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1 i
f: Morphism C1' C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C1') (pr11 C1)
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, H i0): pr11 C1' = pr11 C1
tmp:= transportf_total2_base (pr1 C1') (pr1 C1) e
  (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1) (f i): transportf
(λ x' : ∑ x : hz → A, (λ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧) x,
(λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧) (pr1 x'))
(total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =
transportf (λ x : hz → A, (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧) x) e
(f i)
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 x) i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧) e (f i)

C1, C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1 i
f: Morphism C1' C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C1') (pr11 C1)
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, H i0): pr11 C1' = pr11 C1
tmp:= transportf_total2_base (pr1 C1') (pr1 C1) e
  (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1) (f i): transportf
(λ x' : ∑ x : hz → A, (λ D : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧) x,
(λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧) (pr1 x'))
(total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =
transportf (λ x : hz → A, (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧) x) e
(f i)
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 x) i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x' : ∑ x : hz → A,
          (λ D : hz → A,
           ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧) x,
   (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
     (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1 i
f: Morphism C1' C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C1') (pr11 C1)
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, H i0): pr11 C1' = pr11 C1
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 x) i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x' : ∑ x : hz → A,
          (λ D : hz → A,
           ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ D i, D (i + 1) ⟧) x,
   (λ x0 : pr1 hz → A, A ⟦ x0 i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
     (pr1 x'))
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C1', C2: Complex A
H: ∏ i : hz, C1' i = C1 i
H1: ∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧) (H (i + 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C1' (i + 1) ⟧)
     (H i) (Diff C1' i)) = Diff C1 i
f: Morphism C1' C2
i: hz
e:= funextfun (pr11 C1') (pr11 C1)
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, H i0): pr11 C1' = pr11 C1
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, A ⟦ (pr11 x) i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f
     (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1))
     (ComplexEq'' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i) =
transportf
  (λ x' : ∑ x : hz → A, ∏ i : hz, A ⟦ x i, x (i + 1) ⟧,
   A ⟦ pr1 x' i, (pr11 C2) i ⟧)
  (total2_paths_f e (ComplexEq' A C1' C1 H H1)) (f i)

    use transportf_total2_base.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
           (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
        (to_inv (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))))) =
Diff C i

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
           (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
        (to_inv (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))))) =
Diff C i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
           (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))) = Diff C i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
        (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
           (idpath (i - 1 + 1) @
            ! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
        (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))) = Diff C (i - 1 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
        (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
     (Diff C (i - 1 + 1))) = Diff C (i - 1 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), x ⟧)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) @
   maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)) = Diff C (i - 1 + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths C
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, (C : Complex A) (i0 + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (C : Complex A)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), x ⟧)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, C (i0 + 1))
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) @
   maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1))
  (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)) = Diff C (i - 1 + 1)

     (! idpath (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C (i - 1 + 1), x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (idpath (i - 1 + 1 + 1)))
  (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)) = Diff C (i - 1 + 1)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2)
        (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f))) = f

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2)
        (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f))) = f

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i0 1))
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i0))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i0 1))
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i0))
     (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2)
        (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f))) i = f i

     (λ x : Complex A,

        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2)))

        (λ i : pr1 hz,

        (TranslationComplex C2)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2)
        (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)) i) = f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2) i
      ⟧) (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2)
        (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f) i)) = f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1))) = f i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 (i - 1 + 1), x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
     (TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1))) =
f (i - 1 + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1) = f (i - 1 + 1)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2)
  ((pr21 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
  C1 C2 f

pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C i =
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf
  (λ x : A,
   A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
       C i, x ⟧) (?H (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
        C (i + 1) ⟧) (?H i)
     (Diff
        (pr1
           (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
           C) i)) =
Diff
  (pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C)
  i

i: hz
C (i - 1 + 1) = C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
i - 1 + 1 = i
 apply (hzrminusplus i 1).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf
  (λ x : A,
   A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
       C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C
      i0 =
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
      C i0) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
        C (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i0 : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
       :
       pr1
         (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
         C i0 =
       pr1
         (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
         C i0) i)
     (Diff
        (pr1
           (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
           C) i)) =
Diff
  (pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x : A,
   A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
       C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C
      i =
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
      C i) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
        C (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
       :
       pr1
         (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
         C i =
       pr1
         (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
         C i) i)
     (Diff
        (pr1
           (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
           C) i)) =
Diff
  (pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
        (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C (i + 1))
           (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
        (to_inv (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))))) =
Diff C i
 exact (TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (pr1
          (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
          C)
       (pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C)
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
        :
        pr1
          (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
          C i =
        pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf
          (λ x : A,
           A
           ⟦ pr1
               (functor_identity
                  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
            :
            pr1
              (TranslationFunctor
               ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C i0 =
            pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              pr1
                (TranslationFunctor
                 ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
               :
               pr1
                 (TranslationFunctor
                  ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C i0 =
               pr1 (functor_identity (...)) C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (pr1
                   (TranslationFunctor
                    ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C) i)) =
        Diff
          (pr1
             (functor_identity
                (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C) i))
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (pr1
          (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
          C)
       (pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C)
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
        :
        pr1
          (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor)
          C i =
        pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf
          (λ x : A,
           A
           ⟦ pr1
               (functor_identity
                  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
            :
            pr1
              (TranslationFunctor
               ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C i0 =
            pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              pr1
                (TranslationFunctor
                 ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
               :
               pr1
                 (TranslationFunctor
                  ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C i0 =
               pr1 (functor_identity (...)) C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (pr1
                   (TranslationFunctor
                    ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) C) i)) =
        Diff
          (pr1
             (functor_identity
                (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C) i))
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (TranslationFunctor ∙ InvTranslationFunctor))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
  C1 C2 f

  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
double_transport
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
     C1
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
     (TranslationComplex C2)
     (TranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)) = f

        exact (TranslationInvTranslation_eq2 f).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 + 1 - 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C
              (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
               ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
           (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))))) = Diff C i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (λ x'' : A, A ⟦ x'', C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1))) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths C
        (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus i 1) 1))
     (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))

i: hz
hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 =

 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2)
        (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f))) = f

     (λ x : Complex A,

        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2)
        (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f))) = f

C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i0 1))
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i0))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i0 1))
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i0))
     (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2)
        (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f))) i = f i

  (transportf

        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2)))

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      Morphism x
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2)
        (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)) i) = f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2) i
      ⟧) (maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2)
        (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f) i)) = f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1 - 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1))) = f i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C1 (i + 1 - 1), x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C2 (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C2 (i + 1 - 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
     (InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1))) =
f (i + 1 - 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1) = f (i + 1 - 1)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)

pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2)
  ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
  C1 C2 f

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor) C i =
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf
  (λ x : A,
   A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
       C i, x ⟧) (?H (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
        C (i + 1) ⟧) (?H i)
     (Diff
        (pr1
           (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
           C) i)) =
Diff
  (pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C)
  i

C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
i + 1 - 1 = i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf
  (λ x : A,
   A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
       C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
    :
    pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor) C
      i0 =
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
      C i0) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
        C (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i0 : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
       :
       pr1
         (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
         C i0 =
       pr1
         (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
         C i0) i)
     (Diff
        (pr1
           (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
           C) i)) =
Diff
  (pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf
  (λ x : A,
   A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
       C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
    :
    pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor) C
      i =
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
      C i) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
        C (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
       :
       pr1
         (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
         C i =
       pr1
         (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
         C i) i)
     (Diff
        (pr1
           (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
           C) i)) =
Diff
  (pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 + 1 - 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C
              (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
               ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
           (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))))) = Diff C i
 apply (InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C i).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (pr1
          (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
          C)
       (pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C)
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
        :
        pr1
          (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
          C i =
        pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf
          (λ x : A,
           A
           ⟦ pr1
               (functor_identity
                  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
            :
            pr1
              (InvTranslationFunctor
               ∙ TranslationFunctor) C i0 =
            pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              pr1
                (InvTranslationFunctor
                 ∙ TranslationFunctor) C (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
               :
               pr1
                 (InvTranslationFunctor
                  ∙ TranslationFunctor) C i0 =
               pr1 (functor_identity (...)) C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (pr1
                   (InvTranslationFunctor
                    ∙ TranslationFunctor) C) i)) =
        Diff
          (pr1
             (functor_identity
                (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C) i))
    :
    pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (pr1
          (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
          C)
       (pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C)
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
        :
        pr1
          (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
          C i =
        pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf
          (λ x : A,
           A
           ⟦ pr1
               (functor_identity
                  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
            :
            pr1
              (InvTranslationFunctor
               ∙ TranslationFunctor) C i0 =
            pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              pr1
                (InvTranslationFunctor
                 ∙ TranslationFunctor) C (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
               :
               pr1
                 (InvTranslationFunctor
                  ∙ TranslationFunctor) C i0 =
               pr1 (functor_identity (...)) C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (pr1
                   (InvTranslationFunctor
                    ∙ TranslationFunctor) C) i)) =
        Diff
          (pr1
             (functor_identity
                (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C) i))
    :
    pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
  C1 C2 f

          C i =

           ⟦ pr1

                  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i, x ⟧)

             (λ x : A,

                i)

                (pr1
                   (InvTranslationFunctor
                    ∙ TranslationFunctor) C) i)) =
        Diff
          (pr1
             (functor_identity
                (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C) i))
    :
    pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (pr1
          (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
          C)
       (pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C)
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
        :
        pr1
          (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor)
          C i =
        pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
          C i)

        :

          (λ x : A,
           A
           ⟦ pr1
               (functor_identity
                  (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i, x ⟧)

            maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
            :

              (InvTranslationFunctor
               ∙ TranslationFunctor) C i0 =
            pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) C i0)
             (i + 1))

             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              pr1
                (InvTranslationFunctor
                 ∙ TranslationFunctor) C (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)

                i)

    :

  ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ TranslationFunctor))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
double_transport
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
     C1
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
     (InvTranslationComplex C2)
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2 f)) = f

        exact (InvTranslationTranslation_eq2 f).
  Qed.

  (** *** Natural transformation for equivalence consisting of the translations *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x i))
  (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (identity (x i))
· Diff (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex x))
    i =
Diff x i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1)))
    (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1)))

transportf (precategory_morphisms (x i))
  (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (identity (x i))
· Diff (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex x))
    i =
Diff x i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1)))
    (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1)))

transportf (precategory_morphisms (x i))

· Diff (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex x))

    (identity (x (i + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x i))
  (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (identity (x i))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, x (i + 1))
       (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
    (to_inv (to_inv (Diff x (i - 1 + 1)))) =
Diff x i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1)))
    (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1)))

x: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, (x : Complex A) (i0 + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (x : Complex A)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, x (i + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1)

x: Complex A
i: hz
maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, x (i0 + 1))
  (! idpath (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)) =

  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! idpath (i - 1 + 1 + 1 - 1)))
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, (x : Complex A) (i0 + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (x : Complex A)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, x (i + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, (x : Complex A) (i0 + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (x : Complex A)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
maponpaths (x : Complex A)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1)) =
maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths
  (λ i0 : pr1 hz, (x : Complex A) (i0 + 1))
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (x : Complex A)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
     (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1))
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1)
  (! hzrplusminus (i - 1 + 1) 1) =
! hzrminusplus (i - 1 + 1 + 1) 1
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

x: Complex A

A ⟦ x i,

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i
· Diff (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex x))
    i = Diff x i · ?Mors (i + 1)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
i: hz
A ⟦ x i, x (i - 1 + 1) ⟧

      exact (transportf (precategory_morphisms ((x : Complex A) i))
                        (maponpaths (x : Complex A) (! hzrminusplus i 1))
                        (identity ((x : Complex A) i))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 transportf
   (precategory_morphisms ((x : Complex A) i0))
   (maponpaths (x : Complex A) (! hzrminusplus i0 1))
   (identity ((x : Complex A) i0))
 :
 A ⟦ x i0,
 InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex x) i0 ⟧) i
· Diff (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex x))
    i =
Diff x i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   transportf
     (precategory_morphisms ((x : Complex A) i0))
     (maponpaths (x : Complex A) (! hzrminusplus i0 1))
     (identity ((x : Complex A) i0))
   :
   A ⟦ x i0,
   InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex x) i0 ⟧)
    (i + 1)
 exact (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Eq1 x).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
  (TranslationFunctor_Additive
   ∙ InvTranslationFunctor_Additive)
  (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
   TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)

  (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))

   TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) f
· TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y =
TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x
· # (TranslationFunctor_Additive
     ∙ InvTranslationFunctor_Additive) f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
MorphismComp f
  (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y) =
MorphismComp (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)
  (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex x)
     (TranslationComplex y)
     (TranslationMorphism x y f))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ i : hz,
MorphismComp f
  (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y) i =
MorphismComp (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)
  (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex x)
     (TranslationComplex y)
     (TranslationMorphism x y f)) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
MorphismComp f
  (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y) i =
MorphismComp (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)
  (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex x)
     (TranslationComplex y)
     (TranslationMorphism x y f)) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
f i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (y i))
    (maponpaths y (! hzrminusplus i 1))
    (identity (y i)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x i))
  (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (identity (x i))
· TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
f (i - 1 + 1)
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (y (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths y (! idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
    (identity (y (i - 1 + 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths x (! idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
  (identity (x (i - 1 + 1)))
· TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
f (i - 1 + 1) · identity (y (i - 1 + 1)) =
identity (x (i - 1 + 1))
· TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
f (i - 1 + 1) =
identity (x (i - 1 + 1))
· TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
f (i - 1 + 1) = TranslationMorphism_mor f (i - 1)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
  (TranslationFunctor_Additive
   ∙ InvTranslationFunctor_Additive)
  ((λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
    TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
     (TranslationFunctor_Additive
      ∙ InvTranslationFunctor_Additive))
 exact (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_isnattrans).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (identity (x (i + 1 - 1))) · Diff x i =
Diff (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex x)) i
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))

  (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus i 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (identity (x (i + 1 - 1))) · Diff x i =
to_inv
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths x
        (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
         ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
     (to_inv (Diff x (i + 1 - 1))))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (identity (x (i + 1 - 1))) · Diff x i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths x
     (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
      ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
  (to_inv (to_inv (Diff x (i + 1 - 1))))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))

  (maponpaths x
     (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
      ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1)) (Diff x (i + 1 - 1))
· transportf

    (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1 + 1 - 1)))

  (maponpaths x
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus i 1) 1))

i: hz
hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 =
maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrplusminus i 1) 1
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

      exact (transportf (precategory_morphisms ((x : Complex A) (i + 1 - 1)))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: Complex A
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 transportf
   (precategory_morphisms
      ((x : Complex A) (i0 + 1 - 1)))
   (maponpaths (x : Complex A) (hzrplusminus i0 1))
   (identity ((x : Complex A) (i0 + 1 - 1)))
 :
 A ⟦ TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex x) i0,
 x i0 ⟧) i · Diff x i =
Diff (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex x)) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        ((x : Complex A) (i0 + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (x : Complex A) (hzrplusminus i0 1))
     (identity ((x : Complex A) (i0 + 1 - 1)))
   :
   A
   ⟦ TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex x) i0,
   x i0 ⟧) (i + 1)
 exact (InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Eq1 x).
  Defined.

x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
   ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive) f
· InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor y =
InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x
· # (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ i : hz,
(# (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
    ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive) f
 · InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor y) i =
(InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x
 · # (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) f)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
(# (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
    ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive) f
 · InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor y) i =
(InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x
 · # (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)) f)
  i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (y (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths y (hzrplusminus i 1))
    (identity (y (i + 1 - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths x (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (identity (x (i + 1 - 1))) · f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (y (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths y (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
    (identity (y (i + 1 - 1))) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths x (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
  (identity (x (i + 1 - 1))) · f (i + 1 - 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1)
· identity (y (i + 1 - 1)) =
identity (x (i + 1 - 1)) · f (i + 1 - 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1) =
identity (x (i + 1 - 1)) · f (i + 1 - 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
i: hz
InvTranslationMorphism_mor f (i + 1) = f (i + 1 - 1)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

   ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive)
  (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
  ((λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
    InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
      ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive)
     (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)))
 exact InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_isnattrans.
  Defined.

  (maponpaths x (! hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (identity (x (i + 1)))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (x (i + 1 - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, x (i + 1))
       (hzrplusminus i 1))
    (identity (x (i + 1 - 1 + 1))) =
identity (x (i + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: Complex A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (identity (a (i - 1 + 1))) · Diff a i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (to_inv (Diff a (i - 1 + 1))))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (a (i + 1 - 1 + 1)))

    (identity (a (i + 1 - 1 + 1)))

a: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
  (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) =
maponpaths a
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (identity (a (i - 1 + 1))) · Diff a i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
     (Diff a (i - 1 + 1)))

  (idpath (i - 1 + 1)) =

     (idpath (i - 1 + 1)))
 apply idpath.

a: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
  (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) =

  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
identity (a (i - 1 + 1))
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a (i + 1) ⟧)
    (! maponpaths a (hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff a i) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a

        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) @

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
  (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) =
maponpaths a
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
tmp:= transport_hz_section A (a : Complex A) 1 (Diff a)
  (i - 1 + 1) i (hzrminusplus i 1): transportf (precategory_morphisms ((a : Complex A) (i - 1 + 1)))
(maponpaths (a : Complex A) (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrminusplus i 1) 1))
(Diff a (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, (a : Complex A) (i + 1) ⟧)
(maponpaths (a : Complex A) (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff a i)
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) @
      hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) (Diff a (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a (i + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths a (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff a i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
  (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) =
maponpaths a
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
tmp:= transport_hz_section A a 1 (Diff a) (i - 1 + 1) i
  (hzrminusplus i 1): transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
(maponpaths a (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrminusplus i 1) 1))
(Diff a (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, a (i + 1) ⟧) (maponpaths a (! hzrminusplus i 1))
(Diff a i)
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) @
      hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) (Diff a (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', a (i + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths a (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (Diff a i)

  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
tmp:= transport_hz_section A a 1 (Diff a) (i - 1 + 1) i
  (hzrminusplus i 1): transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
(maponpaths a (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrminusplus i 1) 1))
(Diff a (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, a (i + 1) ⟧) (maponpaths a (! hzrminusplus i 1))
(Diff a i)
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
        (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) @
      hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) (Diff a (i - 1 + 1)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a
     (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrminusplus i 1) 1))
  (Diff a (i - 1 + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
  (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) =
maponpaths a
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
maponpaths a
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) @
   hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1) =
maponpaths a
  (maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrminusplus i 1) 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: Complex A
i: hz
e: maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, a (i0 + 1))
  (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) =
maponpaths a
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
maponpaths (λ i0 : pr1 hz, i0 + 1)
  (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1) @
hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 =
maponpaths_2 hzplus (hzrminusplus i 1) 1
 apply isasethz.
  Qed.

· ?Mors (i + 1)

      exact (transportf (precategory_morphisms ((a : Complex A) (i - 1 + 1)))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 transportf
   (precategory_morphisms
      ((a : Complex A) (i0 - 1 + 1)))
   (maponpaths (a : Complex A) (hzrminusplus i0 1))
   (identity ((a : Complex A) (i0 - 1 + 1)))
 :
 A ⟦ InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a) i0,
 a i0 ⟧) i · Diff a i =
Diff (InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a)) i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        ((a : Complex A) (i0 - 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths (a : Complex A) (hzrminusplus i0 1))
     (identity ((a : Complex A) (i0 - 1 + 1)))
   :
   A
   ⟦ InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a) i0,
   a i0 ⟧) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
(λ i : hz,
 transportf
   (precategory_morphisms
      ((a : Complex A) (i - 1 + 1)))
   (maponpaths (a : Complex A) (hzrminusplus i 1))
   (identity ((a : Complex A) (i - 1 + 1)))
 :
 A ⟦ InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a) i,
 a i ⟧) i · Diff a i =
Diff (InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a)) i
· (λ i : hz,
   transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        ((a : Complex A) (i - 1 + 1)))
     (maponpaths (a : Complex A) (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (identity ((a : Complex A) (i - 1 + 1)))
   :
   A ⟦ InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a) i,
   a i ⟧) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (identity (a (i - 1 + 1))) · Diff a i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
  (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, a (i + 1))
     (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_inv (to_inv (Diff a (i - 1 + 1))))
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (a (i + 1 - 1 + 1)))
 exact (TranslationEquivUnitInvComm a i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
unit_from_left_adjoint
  (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive
     InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
     TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans
     InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
     TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction) a
· TranslationEquivUnitInv a =
identity
  (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A) a)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
  (maponpaths a (! hzrminusplus i 1)) (identity (a i))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i - 1 + 1)))
    (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (identity (a (i - 1 + 1))) = identity (a i)

  (maponpaths a (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
     (maponpaths a (! hzrminusplus i 1))
     (identity (a i)) · identity (a (i - 1 + 1))) =
identity (a i)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
  (maponpaths a
     (! hzrminusplus i 1 @ hzrminusplus i 1))
  (identity (a i)) = identity (a i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
  (maponpaths a (idpath i)) (identity (a i)) =
identity (a i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
(TranslationEquivUnitInv a
 :
 ComplexPreCat_Additive A
 ⟦ InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a), a ⟧)
· unit_from_left_adjoint
    (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive
       InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
       TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans
       InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
       TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction) a =
identity
  (InvTranslationFunctor (TranslationFunctor a))

  (identity (a (i - 1 + 1))) =
identity (a (i - 1 + 1))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.
