A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms ((a : Complex A) i))
  (maponpaths (a : Complex A) (! hzrplusminus i 1))
  (identity ((a : Complex A) i))
· to_inv
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms
          ((a : Complex A) (i + 1 - 1)))
       (maponpaths (a : Complex A)
          (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
           ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
       (to_inv (Diff (a : Complex A) (i + 1 - 1)))) =
Diff a i
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms ((a : Complex A) (i + 1)))
    (maponpaths (a : Complex A)
       (! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity ((a : Complex A) (i + 1)))

a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
tmp':= transport_hz_source_target A (a : Complex A) 1 (Diff a) (i + 1 - 1) i
(hzrplusminus i 1): Diff a i =
transportf
  (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, (a : Complex A) (i + 1) ⟧)
  (maponpaths (a : Complex A)
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        ((a : Complex A) (i + 1 - 1)))
     (maponpaths (a : Complex A)
        (maponpaths_2 hzplus 
           (hzrplusminus i 1) 1))
     (Diff a (i + 1 - 1)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
  (maponpaths a (! hzrplusminus i 1)) (identity (a i))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths a
       (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
        ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (Diff a (i + 1 - 1)) =
Diff a i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1)))
    (maponpaths a (! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (a (i + 1)))

a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz,
 transportf
   (precategory_morphisms ((a : Complex A) i0))
   (maponpaths (a : Complex A) (! hzrplusminus i0 1))
   (identity ((a : Complex A) i0))
 :
 A ⟦ a i0,

· Diff (TranslationFunctor (InvTranslationFunctor a))
    i =
Diff a i
· (λ i0 : hz,
   transportf
     (precategory_morphisms ((a : Complex A) i0))
     (maponpaths (a : Complex A) (! hzrplusminus i0 1))
     (identity ((a : Complex A) i0))
   :
   A ⟦ a i0,
   TranslationFunctor (InvTranslationFunctor a) i0 ⟧)
    (i + 1)

   (identity ((a : Complex A) i))
 :
 A ⟦ a i,

· Diff (TranslationFunctor (InvTranslationFunctor a))
    i =
Diff a i
· (λ i : hz,
   transportf

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
  (maponpaths a (! hzrplusminus i 1)) (identity (a i))
· to_inv
    (transportf
       (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
       (maponpaths a
          (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
           ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
       (to_inv (Diff a (i + 1 - 1)))) =
Diff a i
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1)))
    (maponpaths a (! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
    (identity (a (i + 1)))
 exact (TranslationEquivCounitInvComm a i).
  Defined.

    ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive) a) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
(counit_from_left_adjoint
   (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive
      InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
      TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans
      InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
      TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction) a
 · TranslationEquivCounitInv a) i =
identity
  ((right_adjoint
      (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive
         InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
         TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans
         InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
         TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction)
    ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive) a) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths a (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (identity (a (i + 1 - 1)))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
    (maponpaths a (! hzrplusminus i 1))
    (identity (a i)) = identity (a (i + 1 - 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths a (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
  (identity (a (i + 1 - 1)))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths a (! idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
    (identity (a (i + 1 - 1))) =
identity (a (i + 1 - 1))
 apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
(TranslationEquivCounitInv a
 :
 ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ a,
 TranslationFunctor (InvTranslationFunctor a) ⟧)
· counit_from_left_adjoint
    (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive
       InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
       TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans
       InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
       TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction) a =
identity a

(TranslationEquivCounitInv a

 ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ a,
 TranslationFunctor (InvTranslationFunctor a) ⟧)

    (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive
       InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
       TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans
       InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
       TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction) a =
identity a

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
a: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a i))
  (maponpaths a (! hzrplusminus i 1)) (identity (a i))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths a (hzrplusminus i 1))
    (identity (a (i + 1 - 1))) = identity (a i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

i: hz
transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
  (maponpaths a (! idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
  (identity (a (i + 1 - 1)))
· transportf (precategory_morphisms (a (i + 1 - 1)))
    (maponpaths a (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
    (identity (a (i + 1 - 1))) =
identity (a (i + 1 - 1))
 apply id_left.
  Qed.

is_z_isomorphism
  (counit_from_left_adjoint

        InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
        TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction) b)

 ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive) b ⟧

 ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive) b ⟧
 exact (TranslationEquivCounitInv b).

  (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A) b)

  Defined.

is_z_isomorphism

     (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive

 exact TranslationEquiv_is_iso1.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ b : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
is_z_isomorphism
  (counit_from_left_adjoint
     (make_are_adjoints TranslationFunctor_Additive
        InvTranslationFunctor_Additive

        InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans
        TranslationInvTranslation_adjunction) b)
 exact TranslationEquiv_is_iso2.
  Defined.

  (** ** Translation functor for K(A) *)

  (** *** Image for the translation functor *)

  Definition TranslationFunctorHIm {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             (f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧) : UU :=
    ∑ (h : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦TranslationComplex C1, TranslationComplex C2⟧),
    ∏ (f' : (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧) (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f),
    h = # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f').


  Definition TranslationFunctorHImMor {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             {f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧} (h : TranslationFunctorHIm f) :
    (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦TranslationComplex C1, TranslationComplex C2⟧ := pr1 h.

  Definition TranslationFunctorHImEq {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             {f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧} (h : TranslationFunctorHIm f)
             (f' : (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧) (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f) :
    TranslationFunctorHImMor h = # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f') := pr2 h f' H.

  Definition make_TranslationFunctorHIm {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             {f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧}
             (h : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦TranslationComplex C1, TranslationComplex C2⟧)
             (HH : ∏ (f' : (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧)
                     (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f),
                   h = # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f')) :
    TranslationFunctorHIm f := tpair _ h HH.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
h = h'

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
h = h'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
pr1 h = pr1 h'
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexHomot_Additive A
         ⟦ TranslationComplex C1,
         TranslationComplex C2 ⟧,
   ∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
   → x =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# TranslationFunctor f')) ?p (pr2 h) = pr2 h'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
pr1 h = pr1 h'
 exact e.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexHomot_Additive A
         ⟦ TranslationComplex C1,
         TranslationComplex C2 ⟧,
   ∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
   → x =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# TranslationFunctor f')) e (pr2 h) = pr2 h'
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
isaprop
  (∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
   → pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# TranslationFunctor f'))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
∏ t : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
isaprop
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t = f
   → pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# TranslationFunctor t))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t0 = f
   → pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# TranslationFunctor t0))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t0 = f
→ isaprop
    (pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# TranslationFunctor t0))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': TranslationFunctorHIm f
e: TranslationFunctorHImMor h =
TranslationFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H0: # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t0 = f
isaprop
  (pr1 h' =
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor t0))
 use to_has_homsets.
  Qed.


  (** *** Construction of the functor *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f')

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f')

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (TranslationFunctor C1)
     (TranslationFunctor C2))
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H))
  (# TranslationFunctor f')

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) f'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) = f
 apply hfiberpr2.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
TranslationFunctorHIm f

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
TranslationFunctorHIm f

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ TranslationComplex C1,
TranslationComplex C2 ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
→ ?h =
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f')

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ TranslationComplex C1,
TranslationComplex C2 ⟧
 exact (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# (TranslationFunctor) (hfiberpr1 _ _ H))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
→ # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (# TranslationFunctor
       (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f')
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# TranslationFunctor f')
 exact (TranslationFunctor_eq f H f' H').
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
iscontr (TranslationFunctorHIm f)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
iscontr (TranslationFunctorHIm f)

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop (iscontr (TranslationFunctorHIm f))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ iscontr (TranslationFunctorHIm f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop (iscontr (TranslationFunctorHIm f))
 apply isapropiscontr. 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ iscontr (TranslationFunctorHIm f)

f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

∏ t : TranslationFunctorHIm f, t = ?x

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
TranslationFunctorHIm f
 exact (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
∏ t : TranslationFunctorHIm f,
t = TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

t: TranslationFunctorHIm f
t = TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
t: TranslationFunctorHIm f
TranslationFunctorHImMor t =
TranslationFunctorHImMor
  (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
t: TranslationFunctorHIm f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) = f

      exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ H).
  Qed.

 exact (TranslationComplex C).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a b : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ComplexHomot_Additive A
  ⟦ (λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     TranslationComplex C) a,
  (λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A, TranslationComplex C)
    b ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot_Additive A
⟦ (λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A, TranslationComplex C)
    C1,
(λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A, TranslationComplex C)
  C2 ⟧
 exact (TranslationFunctorHImMor (iscontrpr1 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor f))).
  Defined.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
# TranslationFunctorH_data (identity C) =
identity (TranslationFunctorH_data C)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor (identity C)) =

  (identity (TranslationFunctor C)) =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (TranslationFunctor C)) =
identity (TranslationFunctorH_data C)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (iscontrpr1 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =

  (iscontrpr1 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
· TranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor g))

f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
tmp:= functor_comp (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')): # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(# TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
· # TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(# TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(# TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))
TranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (# TranslationFunctor
       (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))

f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
tmp:= functor_comp (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')): # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

· # TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(# TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(# TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))
TranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
   · # TranslationFunctor
       (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))

g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
tmp:= functor_comp TranslationFunctor
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'): # TranslationFunctor
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
· hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g') =
# TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
· # TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')

  (iscontrpr1 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =

   · # TranslationFunctor

tmp: # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
· hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =

C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A

g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
   · hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g') = f · g

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g') = f · g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
f
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g') = f · g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
f · g = f · g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
# TranslationFunctorH_data (f · g) =
# TranslationFunctorH_data f
· # TranslationFunctorH_data g
 exact (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_Comp f g).
  Qed.

 exact TranslationFunctorH_data.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

 exact TranslationFunctorH_is_functor.
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH =
TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH =
TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
 apply to_has_homsets.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2)
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)) C1
  C2 f

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) C =
pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A) C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
TranslationComplex C = TranslationComplex C
 apply idpath.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (TranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (TranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)) C1
  C2 f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (TranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (TranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)) C1
  C2 f

C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A
   ⟦ pr1 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C1, c ⟧) (idpath (TranslationComplex C2))
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
      pr1
        (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
        C2 ⟧) (idpath (TranslationComplex C1))
     ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A
             ∙ TranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
(pr21 (TranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)) C1
  C2 f

transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,

   pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
     C2 ⟧) (idpath (TranslationComplex C1))
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ TranslationFunctorH))

im:= TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) f': TranslationFunctorHIm

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
im:= TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) f': TranslationFunctorHIm
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) f') =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f

        exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ f').
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
# TranslationFunctorH f =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# TranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f') = f
 exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ f').
  Qed.

  (# TranslationFunctorH g)

f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear TranslationFunctor_Additive
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'): # TranslationFunctor_Additive
(to_binop C1 C2 (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
to_binop (TranslationFunctor_Additive C1) (TranslationFunctor_Additive C2)
(# TranslationFunctor_Additive (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
(# TranslationFunctor_Additive (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))
# TranslationFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (to_binop (TranslationFunctor C1)

     (# TranslationFunctor
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
     (# TranslationFunctor
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')))

  (to_binop C1 C2
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
to_binop C1 C2 f g

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
to_binop C1 C2 f g

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2) f
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
to_binop C1 C2 f g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2) f g = to_binop C1 C2 f g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AdditiveFunctor (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
  (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
AdditiveFunctor (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
  (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟶ ComplexHomot_Additive A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor ?F

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟶ ComplexHomot_Additive A
 exact TranslationFunctorH.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor TranslationFunctorH
 exact TranslationFunctorH_isAdditiveFunctor.
  Defined.


  (** ** Inverse translation in K(A) *)

  Definition InvTranslationFunctorHIm {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             (f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧) : UU :=
    ∑ (h : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦InvTranslationComplex C1, InvTranslationComplex C2⟧),
    ∏ (f' : (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧) (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f),
    h = # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# InvTranslationFunctor f').

  Definition InvTranslationFunctorHImMor {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             {f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧} (h : InvTranslationFunctorHIm f) :
    (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦InvTranslationComplex C1, InvTranslationComplex C2⟧ := pr1 h.

  Definition InvTranslationFunctorHImEq {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             {f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧} (h : InvTranslationFunctorHIm f)
             (f' : (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧) (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f) :
    InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h = # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# InvTranslationFunctor f') :=
    pr2 h f' H.

  Definition make_InvTranslationFunctorHIm {C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A}
             {f : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧}
             (h : (ComplexHomot_Additive A)⟦InvTranslationComplex C1, InvTranslationComplex C2⟧)
             (HH : ∏ (f' : (ComplexPreCat_Additive A)⟦C1, C2⟧)
                     (H : # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f),
                   h = # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# InvTranslationFunctor f')) :
    InvTranslationFunctorHIm f := tpair _ h HH.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
h = h'

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
h = h'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
pr1 h = pr1 h'
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexHomot_Additive A
         ⟦ InvTranslationComplex C1,
         InvTranslationComplex C2 ⟧,
   ∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
   → x =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# InvTranslationFunctor f')) ?p (pr2 h) =
pr2 h'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
pr1 h = pr1 h'
 exact e.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
transportf
  (λ x : ComplexHomot_Additive A
         ⟦ InvTranslationComplex C1,
         InvTranslationComplex C2 ⟧,
   ∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
   → x =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# InvTranslationFunctor f')) e (pr2 h) =
pr2 h'
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
isaprop
  (∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
   → pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# InvTranslationFunctor f'))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
∏ t : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
isaprop
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t = f
   → pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# InvTranslationFunctor t))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t0 = f
   → pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# InvTranslationFunctor t0))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t0 = f
→ isaprop
    (pr1 h' =
     # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (# InvTranslationFunctor t0))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
h, h': InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
e: InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor h'
t0: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H0: # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) t0 = f
isaprop
  (pr1 h' =
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (# InvTranslationFunctor t0))
 use to_has_homsets.
  Qed.


  (** *** Construction of the functor *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# InvTranslationFunctor f')

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# InvTranslationFunctor f')

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
subgrhrel
  (ComplexHomotSubgrp A (InvTranslationFunctor C1)
     (InvTranslationFunctor C2))
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H))
  (# InvTranslationFunctor f')

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 C2)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) f'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) = f
 apply hfiberpr2.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
InvTranslationFunctorHIm f

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
InvTranslationFunctorHIm f

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ InvTranslationComplex C1,
InvTranslationComplex C2 ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
→ ?h =
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (# InvTranslationFunctor f')

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ InvTranslationComplex C1,
InvTranslationComplex C2 ⟧
 exact (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# (InvTranslationFunctor) (hfiberpr1 _ _ H))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
∏ f' : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧,
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
→ # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (# InvTranslationFunctor
       (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
  # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (# InvTranslationFunctor f')
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f': ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f' = f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H)) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# InvTranslationFunctor f')
 exact (InvTranslationFunctor_eq f H f' H').
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
iscontr (InvTranslationFunctorHIm f)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
iscontr (InvTranslationFunctorHIm f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop (iscontr (InvTranslationFunctorHIm f))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ iscontr (InvTranslationFunctorHIm f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop (iscontr (InvTranslationFunctorHIm f))
 apply isapropiscontr. 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ iscontr (InvTranslationFunctorHIm f)

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
iscontr (InvTranslationFunctorHIm f)

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
∏ t : InvTranslationFunctorHIm f, t = ?x

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
 exact (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
∏ t : InvTranslationFunctorHIm f,
t = InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
t: InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
t = InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
t: InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor t =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
t: InvTranslationFunctorHIm f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) = f

      exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ H).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f) =
InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f) =
InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f)) =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f H)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
H: hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f H) = f

    exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ H).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
  (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_data (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
  (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomot_Additive A → ComplexHomot_Additive A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a b : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomot_Additive A → ComplexHomot_Additive A
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
ComplexHomot_Additive A
 exact (InvTranslationComplex C).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ a b : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ ComplexHomot_Additive A
  ⟦ (λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     InvTranslationComplex C) a,
  (λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   InvTranslationComplex C) b ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot_Additive A
⟦ (λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   InvTranslationComplex C) C1,
(λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
 InvTranslationComplex C) C2 ⟧

      exact (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_idax InvTranslationFunctorH_data

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_idax InvTranslationFunctorH_data

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
# InvTranslationFunctorH_data (identity C) =
identity (InvTranslationFunctorH_data C)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# InvTranslationFunctor (identity C)) =
identity (InvTranslationFunctorH_data C)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (identity (InvTranslationFunctor C)) =
identity (InvTranslationFunctorH_data C)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (InvTranslationFunctor C)) =
identity (InvTranslationFunctorH_data C)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
· InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor g))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
· InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor g))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
isaprop
  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
   InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
   · InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
       (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor g)))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
  InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
  · InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
      (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor g))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
isaprop
  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
   InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
   · InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
       (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor g)))
 use to_has_homsets. 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
  InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
  · InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
      (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor g))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))
· InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
    (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor g))

  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (iscontrpr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor (f · g))) =

tmp:= functor_comp (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')): # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(# InvTranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
   · hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g') = f · g

g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧

# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g') = f · g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
f
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g') = f · g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
f · g = f · g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_idax InvTranslationFunctorH_data
 exact InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_Id.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
functor_compax InvTranslationFunctorH_data
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C3: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C2, C3 ⟧
# InvTranslationFunctorH_data (f · g) =
# InvTranslationFunctorH_data f
· # InvTranslationFunctorH_data g
 exact (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_Comp f g).
  Qed.

  (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
 exact InvTranslationFunctorH_data.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_functor InvTranslationFunctorH_data
 exact InvTranslationFunctorH_is_functor.
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH =
InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH =
InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
 apply to_has_homsets.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2)
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A
          ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
  C1 C2 f

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
pr1 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) C =
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A) C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
InvTranslationComplex C = InvTranslationComplex C
 apply idpath.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexPreCat_Additive A)
(f : ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (InvTranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1
       (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1
       (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1
      (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1
      (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (InvTranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1
       (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1
       (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1
      (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1
      (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A
          ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
  C1 C2 f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (InvTranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1
       (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1
       (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1
      (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1
      (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexPreCat_Additive A,
     idpath (InvTranslationComplex C)
     :
     pr1
       (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1
       (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C)
    :
    pr1
      (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1
      (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A
          ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
  C1 C2 f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A
   ⟦ pr1
       (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       C1, c ⟧) (idpath (InvTranslationComplex C2))
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
      pr1
        (ComplexHomotFunctor A
         ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) C2 ⟧)
     (idpath (InvTranslationComplex C1))
     ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A
             ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
(pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
  C1 C2 f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
   pr1
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
     C2 ⟧) (idpath (InvTranslationComplex C1))
  ((pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A
          ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (InvTranslationFunctor ∙ ComplexHomotFunctor A))
  C1 C2 f

(pr21 (ComplexHomotFunctor A ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH))

  C1 C2 f

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
im:= InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) f': InvTranslationFunctorHIm
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
# InvTranslationFunctorH (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (# InvTranslationFunctor f)

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
im:= InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) f': InvTranslationFunctorHIm
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
# InvTranslationFunctorH (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor im

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexPreCat_Additive A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
im:= InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) f': InvTranslationFunctorHIm
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f) f') =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f

        exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ f').
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
# InvTranslationFunctorH f =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f

# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f') = f
 exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ f').
  Qed.

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
tmp:= AdditiveFunctorLinear
  InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'): # InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
(to_binop C1 C2 (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
to_binop (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive C1)
(InvTranslationFunctor_Additive C2)
(# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
(# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))
# InvTranslationFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (to_binop (InvTranslationFunctor C1)
     (InvTranslationFunctor C2)
     (# InvTranslationFunctor
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
     (# InvTranslationFunctor
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')))

g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
tmp: # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
(to_binop C1 C2 (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(to_binop (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive C1)
(InvTranslationFunctor_Additive C2)
(# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
(# InvTranslationFunctor_Additive
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')))
# InvTranslationFunctorH (to_binop C1 C2 f g) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (to_binop (InvTranslationFunctor C1)

        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')))

g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
tmp: # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

(to_binop C1 C2 (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g'))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(to_binop (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive C1)

(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))

(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')))

     (to_binop C1 C2
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
to_binop C1 C2 f g

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2) f
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g g')) =
to_binop C1 C2 f g
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f, g: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
g': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) g
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A C1)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2) f g = to_binop C1 C2 f g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
isAdditiveFunctor InvTranslationFunctorH
 exact InvTranslationFunctorH_isAdditiveFunctor.
  Defined.


  (** Translation functors in K(A) are isomorphisms and inverse to each other. *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
e: C2 = C2'
f: Morphism C1 C2
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x) e f) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, x ⟧)
  e (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2, C2': Complex A
e: C2 = C2'
f: Morphism C1 C2
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x) e f) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, x ⟧)
  e (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
     (idpath C2) f) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, x ⟧)
  (idpath C2) (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1', C1, C2: Complex A
e: C1' = C1
f: Morphism C1' C2
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism x C2) e f) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, C2 ⟧)
  e (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1', C1, C2: Complex A
e: C1' = C1
f: Morphism C1' C2
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism x C2) e f) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, C2 ⟧)
  e (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1', C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1' C2
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism x C2)
     (idpath C1') f) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, C2 ⟧)
  (idpath C1') (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH =
functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)
 apply to_has_homsets.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A)
(f : ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2)
  ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)) C

InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) = C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i = C i
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧) (?H (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C)
        (i + 1) ⟧) (?H i)
     (Diff
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C))
        i)) = Diff C i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i = C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i = C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
C (i - 1 + 1) = C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
i - 1 + 1 = i
 apply (hzrminusplus i 1).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
    :
    InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i0 =
    C i0) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C)
        (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i0 : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
       :
       InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i0 =
       C i0) i)
     (Diff
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C))
        i)) = Diff C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
    :
    InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i =
    C i) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C)
        (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
       :
       InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i =
       C i) i)
     (Diff
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C))
        i)) = Diff C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf
        (precategory_morphisms (C (i - 1 + 1)))
        (maponpaths (λ i : pr1 hz, C (i + 1))
           (hzrminusplus i 1 @ ! hzrplusminus i 1))
        (to_inv (to_inv (Diff C (i - 1 + 1)))))) =
Diff C i
 exact (TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A)
(f : ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C))
       C
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
        :
        InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i =
        C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
            :
            InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              InvTranslationComplex
                (TranslationComplex C) (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
               :
               InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (InvTranslationComplex
                   (TranslationComplex C)) i)) =
        Diff C i)
     :
     pr1
       (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C)
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C))
       C
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
        :
        InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i =
        C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
            :
            InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              InvTranslationComplex
                (TranslationComplex C) (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
               :
               InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (InvTranslationComplex
                   (TranslationComplex C)) i)) =
        Diff C i)
     :
     pr1
       (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C)
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C))
       C
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
        :
        InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i =
        C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
            :
            InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              InvTranslationComplex
                (TranslationComplex C) (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
               :
               InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (InvTranslationComplex
                   (TranslationComplex C)) i)) =
        Diff C i)
     :
     pr1
       (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C)
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C))
       C
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i 1)
        :
        InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C) i =
        C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
            :
            InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              InvTranslationComplex
                (TranslationComplex C) (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrminusplus i0 1)
               :
               InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0) i)
             (Diff
                (InvTranslationComplex
                   (TranslationComplex C)) i)) =
        Diff C i)
     :
     pr1
       (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C)
    :
    pr1 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C1, c ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2 (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
      pr1
        (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
        C2 ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH
             ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A
      ⟦ pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
          C1, c ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
         ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
         pr1
           (TranslationFunctorH
            ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) C2 ⟧)
        (ComplexEq A
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (λ i : hz,
            TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH
                ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
   (pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C1 C2 f)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ transportf
    (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexHomot_Additive A
     ⟦ pr1
         (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
         C1, c ⟧)
    (ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
       C2 (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
    (transportf
       (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
        ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
        pr1
          (TranslationFunctorH
           ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) C2 ⟧)
       (ComplexEq A
          (InvTranslationComplex
             (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
          (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (λ i : hz,
           TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
       ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH
               ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
  (pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
    C1 C2 f

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A
      ⟦ pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
          C1, c ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
         ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
         pr1
           (TranslationFunctorH
            ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH) C2 ⟧)
        (ComplexEq A
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C1)) C1

           (λ i : hz,
            TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH
                ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
   (pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C1 C2 f)

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ transportf
    (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexHomot_Additive A
     ⟦ pr1
         (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
         C1, c ⟧)
    (ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
       C2 (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
    (transportf
       (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
        ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
