A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C1, c ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2 (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
      pr1
        (TranslationFunctorH ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)
        C2 ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     ((pr21 (TranslationFunctorH
             ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (iscontrpr1
           (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor
              (TranslationFunctorHImMor
                 (iscontrpr1
                    (TranslationFunctorH_Mor f))))))) =
f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (iscontrpr1
           (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor
              (TranslationFunctorHImMor
                 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ c : Complex A,
         setquot
           (subgrhrel
              (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                 (InvTranslationComplex
                    (TranslationComplex C2)))))
        (ComplexEq A
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
           (iscontrpr1
              (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor
                 (TranslationFunctorHImMor
                    (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
   f)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationFunctorHImMor
     (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
→ transportf
    (λ c : Complex A,
     setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
    (ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
       C2
       (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (λ i : pr1 hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
    (transportf
       (λ c : Complex A,
        setquot
          (subgrhrel
             (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                (InvTranslationComplex
                   (TranslationComplex C2)))))
       (ComplexEq A
          (InvTranslationComplex
             (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
       (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
          (iscontrpr1
             (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor
                (TranslationFunctorHImMor
                   (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
  f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ c : Complex A,
         setquot
           (subgrhrel
              (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                 (InvTranslationComplex
                    (TranslationComplex C2)))))
        (ComplexEq A
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
           (iscontrpr1
              (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor
                 (TranslationFunctorHImMor
                    (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
   f)
 use (@to_has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)). 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationFunctorHImMor
     (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
→ transportf
    (λ c : Complex A,
     setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
    (ComplexEq A
       (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
       C2
       (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
       (λ i : pr1 hz,
        TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
    (transportf
       (λ c : Complex A,
        setquot
          (subgrhrel
             (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                (InvTranslationComplex
                   (TranslationComplex C2)))))
       (ComplexEq A
          (InvTranslationComplex
             (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
       (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
          (iscontrpr1
             (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor
                (TranslationFunctorHImMor
                   (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
  f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (iscontrpr1
           (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor
              (TranslationFunctorHImMor
                 (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (TranslationFunctorHImMor
              (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f''))) =
f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (TranslationFunctorHImMor
              (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f''))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (TranslationFunctorHImMor
              (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f''))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ x : Complex A,
         Morphism x
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C2)))
        (ComplexEq A
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (InvTranslationMorphism
           (TranslationComplex C1)
           (TranslationComplex C2)
           (TranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
                 f')))))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (TranslationFunctorHImMor
              (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f''))) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, x ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (transportf
        (λ x : Complex A,
         Morphism x
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C2)))
        (ComplexEq A
           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (InvTranslationMorphism
           (TranslationComplex C1)
           (TranslationComplex C2)
           (TranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
                 f')))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (InvTranslationComplex
                 (TranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (TranslationFunctorHImMor
              (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f''))) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, x ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x,
      InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C2) ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         TranslationInvTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
        (InvTranslationMorphism
           (TranslationComplex C1)
           (TranslationComplex C2)
           (TranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
                 f')))))

           (InvTranslationComplex
              (TranslationComplex C2)))))
  (ComplexEq A

  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor

        (TranslationFunctorHImMor
           (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'')) =

     (InvTranslationComplex (TranslationComplex C1))

  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (InvTranslationMorphism (TranslationComplex C1)
        (TranslationComplex C2)
        (TranslationMorphism C1 C2
           (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))))

f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
tmp:= hfiberpr2 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationFunctorHImMor
     (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'') =
TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'') =

tmp:= hfiberpr2 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationFunctorHImMor
     (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'') =
TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')
TranslationFunctorHImMor
  (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f') =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(TranslationFunctorHImMor (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f') = f

        apply (hfiberpr2 _ _ f').
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH =
functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)

pr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

 apply to_has_homsets.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH) =
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A)
(f : ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2)
  ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
pr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH) C =
pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)) C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) = C
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i = C i
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧) (?H (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C)
        (i + 1) ⟧) (?H i)
     (Diff
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C))
        i)) = Diff C i

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i = C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i = C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
C (i + 1 - 1) = C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
i + 1 - 1 = i
 apply (hzrplusminus i 1).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
∏ i : hz,
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
    :
    TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i0 =
    C i0) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C)
        (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i0 : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
       :
       TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i0 =
       C i0) i)
     (Diff
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C))
        i)) = Diff C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  ((λ i : hz,
    maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
    :
    TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i =
    C i) (i + 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C)
        (i + 1) ⟧)
     ((λ i : hz,
       maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
       :
       TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i =
       C i) i)
     (Diff
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C))
        i)) = Diff C i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C: ComplexHomot_Additive A
i: hz
transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
  (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, C (i + 1 + 1 - 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_inv
        (transportf
           (precategory_morphisms (C (i + 1 - 1)))
           (maponpaths C
              (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 @
               ! hzrplusminus (i + 1) 1))
           (to_inv (Diff C (i + 1 - 1)))))) = Diff C i
 exact (InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C i).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
∏ (C1 C2 : ComplexHomot_Additive A)
(f : ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport
  (((λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C))
       C
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
        :
        TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i =
        C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
            :
            TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              TranslationComplex
                (InvTranslationComplex C) (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
               :
               TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
                i)
             (Diff
                (TranslationComplex
                   (InvTranslationComplex C)) i)) =
        Diff C i)
     :
     pr1
       (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C)
    :
    pr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C1)
  (((λ C : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexEq A
       (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C))
       C
       (λ i : hz,
        maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i 1)
        :
        TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C) i =
        C i)
       (λ i : hz,
        InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C i
        :
        transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ C i, x ⟧)
          ((λ i0 : hz,
            maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
            :
            TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
             (i + 1))
          (transportf
             (λ x : A,
              A ⟦ x,
              TranslationComplex
                (InvTranslationComplex C) (i + 1) ⟧)
             ((λ i0 : hz,
               maponpaths C (hzrplusminus i0 1)
               :
               TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C) i0 = C i0)
                i)
             (Diff
                (TranslationComplex
                   (InvTranslationComplex C)) i)) =
        Diff C i)
     :
     pr1
       (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
       C =
     pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C)
    :
    pr1 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH) ~
    pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C2)
  ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH))
     C1 C2 f) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f

        :

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C1, c ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2 (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
      pr1
        (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
        C2 ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctorH
             ∙ TranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A
      ⟦ pr1
          (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
          C1, c ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
         ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
         pr1
           (InvTranslationFunctorH
            ∙ TranslationFunctorH) C2 ⟧)
        (ComplexEq A
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
           (λ i : hz,
            InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctorH
                ∙ TranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
   (pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C1 C2 f)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
→ transportf
    (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
     ComplexHomot_Additive A
     ⟦ pr1
         (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
         C1, c ⟧)
    (ComplexEq A
       (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
       C2 (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
       (λ i : hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
    (transportf
       (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
        ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
        pr1
          (InvTranslationFunctorH
           ∙ TranslationFunctorH) C2 ⟧)
       (ComplexEq A
          (TranslationComplex
             (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
          (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
          (λ i : hz,
           InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
       ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctorH
               ∙ TranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
  (pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
    C1 C2 f

        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))

        ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctorH
                ∙ TranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
   (pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
     C1 C2 f)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
transportf
  (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A
   ⟦ pr1 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
       C1, c ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2 (λ i : hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ c,
      pr1
        (InvTranslationFunctorH ∙ TranslationFunctorH)
        C2 ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     ((pr21 (InvTranslationFunctorH
             ∙ TranslationFunctorH)) C1 C2 f)) =
(pr21 (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))) C1
  C2 f
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (iscontrpr1
           (TranslationFunctorH_Mor
              (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
                 (iscontrpr1
                    (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor f))))))) =
f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (iscontrpr1
           (TranslationFunctorH_Mor
              (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
                 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ c : Complex A,
         setquot
           (subgrhrel
              (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                 (TranslationComplex
                    (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
        (ComplexEq A
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (TranslationFunctorHImMor
           (iscontrpr1
              (TranslationFunctorH_Mor
                 (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
                    (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f
                       f')))))) = f)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
→ transportf
    (λ c : Complex A,
     setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
    (ComplexEq A
       (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
       C2
       (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
       (λ i : pr1 hz,
        InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
    (transportf
       (λ c : Complex A,
        setquot
          (subgrhrel
             (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                (TranslationComplex
                   (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
       (ComplexEq A
          (TranslationComplex
             (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
       (TranslationFunctorHImMor
          (iscontrpr1
             (TranslationFunctorH_Mor
                (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
                   (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f
                      f')))))) = f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
isaprop
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ c : Complex A,
         setquot
           (subgrhrel
              (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                 (TranslationComplex
                    (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
        (ComplexEq A
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (TranslationFunctorHImMor
           (iscontrpr1
              (TranslationFunctorH_Mor
                 (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
                    (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f
                       f')))))) = f)
 use (@to_has_homsets (ComplexHomot_Additive A)).

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
→ transportf
    (λ c : Complex A,
     setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
    (ComplexEq A
       (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
       C2
       (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
       (λ i : pr1 hz,
        InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
    (transportf
       (λ c : Complex A,
        setquot
          (subgrhrel
             (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
                (TranslationComplex
                   (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
       (ComplexEq A
          (TranslationComplex
             (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
          (λ i : pr1 hz,
           InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
       (TranslationFunctorHImMor
          (iscontrpr1
             (TranslationFunctorH_Mor
                (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
                   (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f
                      f')))))) = f

(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2

        (subgrhrel

              (TranslationComplex

     (ComplexEq A

                 (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')))))) =
f

C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))

     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1

     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
              (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
           f''))) = f

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1

     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
              (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
           f''))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
              (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
           f''))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (transportf (λ x : Complex A, Morphism C1 x)
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
        C2
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
     (transportf
        (λ x : Complex A,
         Morphism x
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C2)))
        (ComplexEq A
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (TranslationMorphism
           (InvTranslationComplex C1)
           (InvTranslationComplex C2)
           (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
                 f')))))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
              (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
           f''))) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, x ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (transportf
        (λ x : Complex A,
         Morphism x
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C2)))
        (ComplexEq A
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C1)) C1
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
           (λ i : pr1 hz,
            InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
        (TranslationMorphism
           (InvTranslationComplex C1)
           (InvTranslationComplex C2)
           (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
                 f')))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot (subgrhrel (ComplexHomotSubgrp A C1 c)))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ c : Complex A,
      setquot
        (subgrhrel
           (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
              (TranslationComplex
                 (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (TranslationFunctorHImMor
        (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
           (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
              (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
           f''))) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A, ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, x ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2))
     C2
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C2 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C2 i))
  (transportf
     (λ x : Complex A,
      ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x,
      TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2) ⟧)
     (ComplexEq A
        (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
        C1
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
     (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
        (TranslationMorphism
           (InvTranslationComplex C1)
           (InvTranslationComplex C2)
           (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
              (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
                 f')))))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
transportf
  (λ c : Complex A,
   setquot
     (subgrhrel
        (ComplexHomotSubgrp A c
           (TranslationComplex
              (InvTranslationComplex C2)))))
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
     C1
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
  (TranslationFunctorHImMor
     (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
        (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
           (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'')) =
transportf
  (λ x : Complex A,
   ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x,
   TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C2) ⟧)
  (ComplexEq A
     (TranslationComplex (InvTranslationComplex C1))
     C1
     (λ i : pr1 hz, maponpaths C1 (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (λ i : pr1 hz, InvTranslationTranslation_eq1 C1 i))
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
        (InvTranslationComplex C2)
        (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
           (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
TranslationFunctorHImMor
  (TranslationFunctorH_Mor_data
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'') =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
     (InvTranslationComplex C2)
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationMorphism (InvTranslationComplex C1)
     (InvTranslationComplex C2)
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))) =
# TranslationFunctorH
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
        (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
tmp:= hfiberpr2 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'') =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
        (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'') =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))

f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
tmp:= hfiberpr2 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
     (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'': # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')) f'') =
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f')
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f') =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
InvTranslationFunctorHImMor
  (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f') =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (InvTranslationMorphism C1 C2
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
f'': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
(InvTranslationFunctorHImMor (InvTranslationFunctorH_Mor_data f f'))
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f') = f

        apply (hfiberpr2 _ _ f').
  Qed.

  (** ** Translation equivalence for K(A) *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
  (TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
   ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor)
  (λ x : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
  (TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
   ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor)
  (λ x : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)) f
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)
· # (TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
     ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor) f

· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)
· # (TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
     ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor) f

isaprop
  (# (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)) f
   · # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
       (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y) =
   # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x)
   · # (TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
        ∙ InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor) f)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
tmp:= TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_isnattrans x y
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'): # (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
· (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive A, TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x) y =
(λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive A, TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x) x
· # (TranslationFunctor_Additive ∙ InvTranslationFunctor_Additive)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
· TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y =
TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x
· # InvTranslationFunctor
    (# TranslationFunctor
       (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
tmp:= TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_isnattrans x y
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'): hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
· TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y =
TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x
· # InvTranslationFunctor
(# TranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
· TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor y =
TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x
· # InvTranslationFunctor
    (# TranslationFunctor
       (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
 exact tmp.
  Qed.

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
tmp:= InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_isnattrans x y
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'): # (InvTranslationFunctor_Additive ∙ TranslationFunctor_Additive)
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
· (λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive A, InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x) y =
(λ x : ComplexPreCat_Additive A, InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x) x
· # (functor_identity (ComplexPreCat_Additive A))
(hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f')
# TranslationFunctor
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
· InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor y =
InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x
· hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x, y: ComplexHomot_Additive A
f: ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f
tmp:= InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_isnattrans x y
  (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'): # TranslationFunctor
(# InvTranslationFunctor (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
· InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor y =
InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x
· hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
# TranslationFunctor
  (# InvTranslationFunctor
     (hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'))
· InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor y =
InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x
· hfiberpr1 # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) f f'
 exact tmp.
  Qed.

ComplexHomot_Additive A
⟦ (InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
   ∙ TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor) x,
functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A) x ⟧

      exact (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
is_nat_trans
  (InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
   ∙ TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor)
  (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A))
  ((λ x : ComplexHomot_Additive A,
    # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
      (InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor x))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (InvTranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor
      ∙ TranslationFunctorH_AdditiveFunctor)
     (functor_identity (ComplexHomot_Additive A)))
 exact InvTranslationHTranslationHNatTrans_isnattrans.
  Defined.

  Local Opaque precategory_morphisms InvTranslationFunctorHIm TranslationFunctorHIm
        ComplexHomotFunctor compose InvTranslationFunctorH TranslationFunctorH
        TranslationFunctor InvTranslationFunctor identity.


  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
x: ComplexHomot_Additive A
# TranslationFunctorH
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
     (TranslationTranslationInvNatTrans_Mor x))
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
    (InvTranslationTranslationNatTrans_Mor
       (TranslationFunctorH x)) =
identity (TranslationFunctorH x)
